---
title: "Project 1: Checkpoint 1"
author: "Hailey Hossain"
format: html
embed-resources: true
editor: source
code-tools: true
execute:
  warning: false
---

## Context of the Data


## Data Cleaning


## Research Questions

These questions can be addressed using the data:

- question one
- question two

These questions can be addressed using supplemental data:

- question one
- question two


## Visualization
